lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਖਣਿ ਅਉਖਾ ਨਾਨਕਾ ਆਖਿ ਨ ਜਾਪੈ ਆਖਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: aakhan aaukhaa naanakaa aakh na jaapai aakh |2|
lines.english: It is so difficult to chant it, O Nanak; it cannot be chanted with the mouth. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਇ ਸੁਣਿਐ ਮਨੁ ਰਹਸੀਐ ਨਾਮੇ ਸਾਂਤਿ ਆਈ ॥
lines.translit: naae suniai man rahaseeai naame saant aaee |
lines.english: Hearing the Name, the mind is delighted. The Name brings peace and tranquility.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਇ ਸੁਣਿਐ ਨਾਉ ਊਪਜੈ ਨਾਮੇ ਵਡਿਆਈ ॥
lines.translit: naae suniai naau aoopajai naame vaddiaaee |
lines.english: Hearing the Name, one becomes famous; the Name brings glorious greatness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਇ ਸੁਣਿਐ ਮਨੁ ਤ੍ਰਿਪਤੀਐ ਸਭ ਦੁਖ ਗਵਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: naae suniai man tripateeai sabh dukh gavaaee |
lines.english: Hearing the Name, the mind is satisfied, and all pains are taken away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਈਐ ਨਾਨਕ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਈ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: guramukh naam dhiaaeeai naanak liv laaee |6|
lines.english: The Gurmukh meditates on the Name; Nanak is lovingly attuned to the Name. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੇ ਹੀ ਸਭ ਜਾਤਿ ਪਤਿ ਨਾਮੇ ਗਤਿ ਪਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: naame hee sabh jaat pat naame gat paaee |
lines.english: The Name brings all honor and status; through the Name, salvation is obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੂਠਿ ਨ ਅੰਨੀ ਜੂਠਿ ਨ ਨਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: jootth na anee jootth na naaee |
lines.english: Impurity does not come from food; impurity does not come from ritual cleansing baths.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Salok, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੂਠਿ ਨ ਚੰਦ ਸੂਰਜ ਕੀ ਭੇਦੀ ॥
lines.translit: jootth na chand sooraj kee bhedee |
lines.english: Impurity does not come from the phases of the sun and the moon.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੂਠਿ ਨ ਰਾਗਂ‍ੀ ਜੂਠਿ ਨ ਵੇਦਂ‍ੀ ॥
lines.translit: jootth na raaganee jootth na vedanee |
lines.english: Impurity does not come from music; impurity does not come from the Vedas.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੂਠਿ ਨ ਪਉਣੈ ਮਾਹਿ ਸਮਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: jootth na paunai maeh samaanee |
lines.english: Impurity does not come from the air which is diffused everywhere.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੂਠਿ ਨ ਧਰਤੀ ਜੂਠਿ ਨ ਪਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: jootth na dharatee jootth na paanee |
lines.english: Impurity does not come from the earth; impurity does not come from the water.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੂਠਿ ਨ ਮੀਹੁ ਵਰ੍ਹਿਐ ਸਭ ਥਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: jootth na meehu varhiai sabh thaaee |
lines.english: Impurity does not come from the rain, which falls everywhere.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੁਹਿ ਫੇਰਿਐ ਮੁਹੁ ਜੂਠਾ ਹੋਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: muhi feriai muhu jootthaa hoe |1|
lines.english: Impurity comes from turning one's face away from God. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਿਗੁਰਿਆ ਗੁਣੁ ਨਾਹੀ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: naanak niguriaa gun naahee koe |
lines.english: O Nanak, the one who has no Guru, has no redeeming virtues at all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਚੁਲੀਆ ਸੁਚੀਆ ਜੇ ਭਰਿ ਜਾਣੈ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: naanak chuleea sucheea je bhar jaanai koe |
lines.english: O Nanak, the mouth is truly cleansed by ritual cleansing, if you really know how to do it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੁਰਤੇ ਚੁਲੀ ਗਿਆਨ ਕੀ ਜੋਗੀ ਕਾ ਜਤੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: surate chulee giaan kee jogee kaa jat hoe |
lines.english: For the intuitively aware, cleansing is spiritual wisdom. For the Yogi, it is self-control.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬ੍ਰਹਮਣ ਚੁਲੀ ਸੰਤੋਖ ਕੀ ਗਿਰਹੀ ਕਾ ਸਤੁ ਦਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: brahaman chulee santokh kee girahee kaa sat daan |
lines.english: For the Brahmin, cleansing is contentment; for the householder, it is truth and charity.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਜੇ ਚੁਲੀ ਨਿਆਵ ਕੀ ਪੜਿਆ ਸਚੁ ਧਿਆਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: raaje chulee niaav kee parriaa sach dhiaan |
lines.english: For the king, cleansing is justice; for the scholar, it is true meditation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਣੀ ਚਿਤੁ ਨ ਧੋਪਈ ਮੁਖਿ ਪੀਤੈ ਤਿਖ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: paanee chit na dhopee mukh peetai tikh jaae |
lines.english: The consciousness is not washed with water; you drink it to quench your thirst.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਣੀ ਪਿਤਾ ਜਗਤ ਕਾ ਫਿਰਿ ਪਾਣੀ ਸਭੁ ਖਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: paanee pitaa jagat kaa fir paanee sabh khaae |2|
lines.english: Water is the father of the world; in the end, water destroys it all. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਇ ਸੁਣਿਐ ਸਭ ਸਿਧਿ ਹੈ ਰਿਧਿ ਪਿਛੈ ਆਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: naae suniai sabh sidh hai ridh pichhai aavai |
lines.english: Hearing the Name, all supernatural spiritual powers are obtained, and wealth follows along.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਇ ਸੁਣਿਐ ਸੰਤੋਖੁ ਹੋਇ ਕਵਲਾ ਚਰਨ ਧਿਆਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: naae suniai santokh hoe kavalaa charan dhiaavai |
lines.english: Hearing the Name, contentment comes, and Maya meditates at one's feet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਇ ਸੁਣਿਐ ਨਉ ਨਿਧਿ ਮਿਲੈ ਮਨ ਚਿੰਦਿਆ ਪਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: naae suniai nau nidh milai man chindiaa paavai |
lines.english: Hearing the Name, the nine treasures are received, and the mind's desires are obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮਤੀ ਨਾਉ ਪਾਈਐ ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵੈ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: guramatee naau paaeeai naanak gun gaavai |7|
lines.english: Through the Guru's Teachings, the Name is obtained; O Nanak, sing His Glorious Praises. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਇ ਸੁਣਿਐ ਸਹਜੁ ਊਪਜੈ ਸਹਜੇ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: naae suniai sehaj aoopajai sahaje sukh paavai |
lines.english: Hearing the Name, intuitive peace and poise wells up.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Salok, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਖੁ ਦੁਖੁ ਅਗੈ ਆਖੀਐ ਪੜੑਿ ਪੜੑਿ ਕਰਹਿ ਪੁਕਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: dukh dukh agai aakheeai parra parra kareh pukaar |
lines.english: Hereafter, there is said to be pain, only pain; the more the mortals read, the more they cry out.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਖ ਵਿਚਿ ਜੰਮਣੁ ਦੁਖਿ ਮਰਣੁ ਦੁਖਿ ਵਰਤਣੁ ਸੰਸਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: dukh vich jaman dukh maran dukh varatan sansaar |
lines.english: In pain, we are born; in pain, we die. In pain, we deal with the world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਖ ਵਿਚਿ ਜੀਉ ਜਲਾਇਆ ਦੁਖੀਆ ਚਲਿਆ ਰੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: dukh vich jeeo jalaaeaa dukheea chaliaa roe |
lines.english: In pain, the soul burns; in pain, it departs weeping and wailing.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਖ ਕੀਆ ਪੰਡਾ ਖੁਲੑੀਆ ਸੁਖੁ ਨ ਨਿਕਲਿਓ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: dukh keea panddaa khulaeea sukh na nikalio koe |
lines.english: The packages of pain are untied, but peace does not emerge.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਖ ਕੀਆ ਅਗੀ ਮਾਰੀਅਹਿ ਭੀ ਦੁਖੁ ਦਾਰੂ ਹੋਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: dukh keea agee maareeeh bhee dukh daaroo hoe |1|
lines.english: In the fire of pain, the mortals die; but pain is also the cure. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਿਫਤੀ ਰਤਿਆ ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਹਰਿਆ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: naanak sifatee ratiaa man tan hariaa hoe |
lines.english: O Nanak, imbued with the Lord's Praise, the mind and body blossom forth, rejuvenated.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਸੋ ਭਸੁ ਕਮਾਵਣੀ ਭੀ ਭਸੁ ਭਰੀਐ ਦੇਹ ॥
lines.translit: bhaso bhas kamaavanee bhee bhas bhareeai deh |
lines.english: The mortal earns only the dust of the dust; his body is covered with dust.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਦੁਨੀਆ ਭਸੁ ਰੰਗੁ ਭਸੂ ਹੂ ਭਸੁ ਖੇਹ ॥
lines.translit: naanak duneea bhas rang bhasoo hoo bhas kheh |
lines.english: O Nanak, worldly pleasures are nothing more than dust. They are the dust of the dust of ashes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਜੀਉ ਵਿਚਹੁ ਕਢੀਐ ਭਸੂ ਭਰਿਆ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: jaa jeeo vichahu kadteeai bhasoo bhariaa jaae |
lines.english: When the soul is taken out of the body, it too is covered with dust.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਗੈ ਲੇਖੈ ਮੰਗਿਐ ਹੋਰ ਦਸੂਣੀ ਪਾਇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: agai lekhai mangiai hor dasoonee paae |2|
lines.english: And when one's account is called for in the world hereafter, he receives only ten times more dust. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਇ ਸੁਣਿਐ ਸੁਚਿ ਸੰਜਮੋ ਜਮੁ ਨੇੜਿ ਨ ਆਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: naae suniai such sanjamo jam nerr na aavai |
lines.english: Hearing the Name, one is blessed with purity and self-control, and the Messenger of Death will not draw near.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਇ ਸੁਣਿਐ ਘਟਿ ਚਾਨਣਾ ਆਨੑੇਰੁ ਗਵਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: naae suniai ghatt chaananaa aanaer gavaavai |
lines.english: Hearing the Name, the heart is illumined, and darkness is dispelled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਇ ਸੁਣਿਐ ਪਾਪ ਕਟੀਅਹਿ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਸਚੁ ਪਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: naae suniai paap katteeeh niramal sach paavai |
lines.english: Hearing the Name, sins are eradicated, and one meets the Immaculate True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਇ ਸੁਣਿਐ ਆਪੁ ਬੁਝੀਐ ਲਾਹਾ ਨਾਉ ਪਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: naae suniai aap bujheeai laahaa naau paavai |
lines.english: Hearing the Name, one comes to understand his own self, and the profit of the Name is obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਇ ਸੁਣਿਐ ਮੁਖ ਉਜਲੇ ਨਾਉ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਧਿਆਵੈ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: naanak naae suniai mukh ujale naau guramukh dhiaavai |8|
lines.english: O Nanak, hearing the Name, one's face becomes radiant. As Gurmukh, meditate on the Name. ||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Salok, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਰਿ ਨਾਰਾਇਣੁ ਸਭਾ ਨਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: ghar naaraaein sabhaa naal |
lines.english: In your home, is the Lord God, along with all your other gods.
